text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English.
zh: 大家好,欢迎收看《Real Easy English》。

text: In this podcast, we have real conversations in Easy English to help you learn.
zh: 在这个播客节目中,我们用简单英语进行真实对话,帮助大家学习。

text: I'm Georgie. And I'm Beth. You can watch a video version of this podcast
zh: 我是Georgie。我是Beth。你可以在我们的网站上观看这个播客的视频版本

text: and find a worksheet to help you learn on our website bbclearningenglish
zh: 并找到帮助你学习的练习页,网址是bbclearningenglish

text: .com. Hello Beth, how are you today?
zh: .com。你好,Beth,今天怎么样?

text: I'm very well, thank you. How are you? Yes, I'm fine, thank you. Today we're talking all about
zh: 我很好,谢谢。你呢?是的,我也很好,谢谢。今天我们要聊的是

text: being creative. If you are a creative person,
zh: 关于有创造力这件事。如果你是一个有创造力的人,

text: you enjoy things like art or making things and you have lots of ideas.
zh: 你会喜欢艺术或制作东西之类的事情,而且你总有很多想法。

text: Okay, so let's get started. Are you a creative person?
zh: 好,那我们开始吧。你是一个有创造力的人吗?

text: Well, we have quite a creative job, don't We are always coming up with ideas for new series.
zh: 嗯,我们的工作其实挺有创意的,对吧?我们总是在为新系列想点子。

text: Editing videos is quite a creative thing. I think I'm creative. What about you?
zh: 剪辑视频也是件挺有创意的事。我觉得我挺有创造力的。你呢?

text: Yeah, I think especially when you talk about what we do for work, we invent new ideas and
zh: 是啊,我觉得尤其是说到我们的工作,我们要想新点子、

text: write scripts and that is quite inventive but what about outside of work?
zh: 写脚本,这挺有创造性的,但工作之外呢?

text: That's what I was gonna say yes outside of work I don't have any hobbies that are creative but
zh: 这正是我想说的,是的,工作之外我没有什么算是有创意的爱好,不过

text: when I was at school I used to do photography as a class
zh: 我上学的时候有摄影课,

text: and that was quite creative you have to have a good eye when you when you do photography
zh: 那还挺有创意的,拍照的时候得有一双好眼力,

text: but nowadays I don't do much actually sometimes I like coloring in with those coloring books
zh: 不过现在我基本不怎么做了,其实有时候我喜欢玩那种填色书,

text: I enjoy that but I also think you're not really creating much you're just choosing the colors
zh: 我挺喜欢那个的,不过我也觉得那算不上真正的创作,只是在选颜色而已。

text: yeah you almost need to draw the picture and then color in yourself yeah maybe I'll do that I'll try that
zh: 对,得自己先把画画出来再上色才算,嗯,也许我可以试试那样做。

text: what about you outside of work I think I was probably more creative when I was was younger.
zh: 你呢,工作之外?我觉得我可能小时候更有创造力。

text: Although one of my friends at the moment is pregnant
zh: 不过我有个朋友最近怀孕了,

text: so I have been making a blanket for her baby.
zh: 所以我一直在给她的宝宝做一条毯子。

text: It's a patchwork quilt so that means there's different squares of fabric
zh: 是一条拼布被,就是用不同的布块拼起来的,

text: and I've been cutting them out and sewing them together with my sewing machine.
zh: 我一直在把布剪出来,再用缝纫机把它们缝在一起。

text: Wow. What colours are in your patchwork quilt?
zh: 哇。你的拼布被用了什么颜色?

text: Well, they're kind of blues and whites
zh: 嗯,大概是蓝色、白色,

text: and orangey because she doesn't know if it's going to be a boy or a girl.
zh: 还有点橙色,因为她还不知道是男孩还是女孩。

text: And they're all a little bit patterned. So, yeah, so I've been making that.
zh: 布块上都带点花纹。所以呢,我就一直在做这个。

text: So recently I have been creative. Nice.
zh: 所以最近我也挺有创造力的。真不错。

text: And Beth, are there any creative things, hobbies you'd like to try?
zh: 那Beth,有没有什么你想尝试的创意爱好?

text: Actually, I know someone who does ceramics.
zh: 其实,我认识一个人,他做陶艺。

text: so they make pots and mugs and plates and he does classes
zh: 他们会做罐子、杯子、盘子之类的东西,他还开课教人,

text: so I'd quite like to take up ceramics or something like that just to give it a try.
zh: 所以我挺想去试试陶艺之类的东西,体验一下。

text: That's a really good idea because then you can have new things to have in your kitchen, things that you can actually use.
zh: 这个主意挺好的,因为这样你就能有些新东西放在厨房里,而且是真的能用的。

text: Exactly yeah and again it's something I did as a child for fun
zh: 没错,而且我小时候也做过这个,当时纯粹是为了好玩,

text: but I wouldn't really think about doing it now but if I like took it up as a hobby
zh: 但现在不太会想去做,不过如果我把它当成一个爱好捡起来,

text: then it's something creative to do yeah nice to do with your hands what about you
zh: 那就是件挺有创意的事了,而且是用手做的,挺不错的。你呢?

text: I don't have any ideas at the moment but I would like to spend my free time doing something creative
zh: 我目前还没什么想法,不过我挺想花点空闲时间做点有创意的事,

text: because I think it's quite therapeutic it's a good way to
zh: 因为我觉得这挺有疗愈效果的,是一种

text: take your mind off the stresses of life so yeah No ideas yet, but watch this space.
zh: 让自己不去想生活压力的好方法,所以呢,还没想法,不过大家可以拭目以待。

text: OK, let's recap the language we heard during the conversation,
zh: 好,我们来回顾一下这次对话中出现的词汇,

text: starting with creative, which describes someone who likes art or has lots of ideas.
zh: 先从creative(有创造力的)开始,用来形容喜欢艺术或者点子很多的人。

text: We also had sewing, which is when you make things from material like clothes or blankets.
zh: 我们还提到了sewing(缝纫),就是用布料之类的材料做衣服或毯子这种东西。

text: We also had ceramics, which is also called pottery, which is when you make things like bowls and plates out of a material called clay.
zh: 我们还提到了ceramics(陶艺),也叫pottery,就是用一种叫做clay(粘土)的材料做碗、盘子这类东西。

text: And if you take up a hobby, you start doing it for the first time.
zh: 另外,如果你take up(开始培养)一个爱好,意思就是你第一次开始做这件事。

text: And that's it for this episode of Real Easy English.
zh: 好了,这一期《Real Easy English》就到这里。

text: Remember, you can test what you've learnt using the worksheet on our website,
zh: 记得可以用我们网站上的练习页来测试一下自己学到的内容,

text: bbclearningenglish .com. See you then. Bye.
zh: 网址是bbclearningenglish.com。下次再见,拜拜。
